title: cymbopogon iwarancusa
intro: Cymbopogon iwarancusa, also known as lemongrass oil grass or West Indian lemongrass, is a species of grass in the lemongrass genus that is widely used for its medicinal properties and culinary purposes. The plant is rich in citral, a compound that has antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are used to treat digestive issues, wounds, and other health conditions. The health benefits of Cymbopogon iwarancusa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and relieving pain and inflammation. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as tea, essential oil, and capsules, which are used to promote relaxation, improve sleep, and boost the immune system.
